MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,289.65 FILED BY JAIN, SANDEEP AS TO DEFENDANT SHERROUSE, LEIGH DBA LEIGH SHERROUSE DESIGNS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAIN, SANDEEP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHERROUSE, LEIGH DBA LEIGH SHERROUSE DESIGNS $4,289.65 PRINCIPAL, $590.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,879.65, PLAINTIFF'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
